canonical_statement: Quivrr focuses on premium surfboards from established and respected manufacturers—boards selected for design quality, performance, durability and long-term value in a surfer's quiver. Quivrr does not aim to catalogue every low-cost or disposable board on the market.
beginner_statement: Quivrr focuses on premium hardboards from established surfboard manufacturers. For a true beginner, the right first board may still be a large softboard or surf-school board, which Quivrr does not currently catalogue. Bodhi should say that honestly rather than recommend a premium performance board too early.

language_rules.reason: Keep the positioning confident, respectful and commercially safe.
